creator: n.diablo.n.f@list.ru
text:
I downgraded graphics/mesa-dri port to revision 537998, compiled and installed. This did not solve the problem.

After I downgraded graphics/mesa-dri port to revision 534936, compiled and installed. And that solved the problem.

I do not know what the problem was, in meson or something else.

But now i have mesa-libs compiled with meson (port version 19.0.8_1) and mesa-dri compiled without meson (port version 19.0.8 revision 534936). And it is look well.
